description_long: This is a mid-century modern style swivel chair with a matching ottoman, both upholstered in rich caramel brown leather. The chair features a high, cushioned backrest with deep button tufting, a wide and plush seat, and gently curved armrests, all supported by a black metal star-shaped base. The ottoman mirrors the chair's tufted leather upholstery and also sits atop a matching black metal base. The chair's back and seat are generously padded, providing both comfort and support, while the leather surface has a subtle sheen and smooth texture. The overall silhouette is elegant and inviting, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, lounges, or office waiting areas. The visible stitching and button details add a touch of sophistication and craftsmanship to the design.
description: A caramel brown leather swivel chair with deep button tufting, curved armrests, and a matching ottoman, both set on black metal star bases. The chair is plush, stylish, and designed for comfort and visual appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high tufted backrest, wide seat, curved armrests, and matching ottoman.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's reclined profile, thick cushioning, and the star-shaped metal base of both chair and ottoman.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned leather back and the full width of the headrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chair's ergonomic contour, armrest shape, and ottoman alignment.
attribute_central_support_column: A single black metal cylindrical column branching into a four-pointed star-shaped base; fixed height, sturdy, and functional.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, and gently contoured with deep button tufting, thick padding, and smooth caramel brown leather upholstery.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, gently curved armrests upholstered in matching leather, seamlessly attached to the seat frame with no visible hardware.
